code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut is_sep = false
  if i == n
    is_sep = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      end
    when None
      is_sep = true
    end
  end
  if is_sep
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut remaining = nums
while remaining.len() > 0
  mut min_idx = 0
  mut min_val = match remaining.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut k = 1
  while k < remaining.len()
    let cur = match remaining.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if cur < min_val
      min_val = cur
      min_idx = k
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
  mut rebuilt: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < remaining.len()
    if j == min_idx
      ()
    else
      let v = match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      rebuilt = list.push(rebuilt, v)
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  remaining = rebuilt
end

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
while p < sorted.len()
  let v = match sorted.get(p)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if p == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  p = p + 1
end
println(out)
